title: Magnet
description: This Minecraft datapack adds a magnet that works within a radius of 6 blocks. It automatically attracts nearby items, making them easy to collect. Perfect for players who want to increase their efficiency when gathering resources!
body:
# 🧲Magnet Datapack:
This Minecraft datapack adds a handy magnet that automatically attracts all nearby items within a 6-block radius. Perfect for players looking to increase their efficiency when gathering resources!

# ⚙️Features:

• Automatically collects items within a 6-block radius

• The magnet must be held in the off-hand to function

• Ideal for mining, farming, or collecting items after a fight

• Saves time

# 🛠️Crafting Recipe:

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/404eec749d33d4b58e6cf72c53a68adb3f386d70.png)

# 📥Installation:
1. Download the datapack.

2. Place it in your "datapacks" folder within your Minecraft world.

3. Reload the world or use /reload to activate the datapack.

4. Enhance your Minecraft experience and let the items fly right to you!
